title: Food Recommendation System API
summary: A Python API to exchange data between a Flutter frontend, MongoDB, and an AI recommendation model.
description: This repository serves as the backend component for a Food Recommendation System project. Developed using Flask, the API facilitates communication between a Flutter-based mobile frontend, a MongoDB database, and an external AI recommendation model. It securely handles data exchange, user authentication (via bcrypt), and requests routing within a local network testing environment.
highlights: Serves as middleware between a Flutter app, an AI model, and MongoDB layer
Handles API requests and basic data routing
